name: get_top_rated_organic
description: Get highest-rated organic products sorted by rating (highest first), then review count. Returns complete product details INCLUDING name, description, category, rating, review_count, price, units_sold, and stock_quantity. NOTE: This tool does NOT filter by price - if you need products in a specific price range, call this tool once with a higher limit and filter the results yourself based on the price field. All organic product tools access the same product catalog, just sorted differently.

category.description: Filter by category (smartphone, laptop, smartwatch, speaker, headphones). Omit for all categories.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return (default 10, range 1-50). Use higher limits (20-30) when you need to filter results by price or other criteria.

include_out_of_stock.description: Include out-of-stock products in results (default false)

name: get_best_sellers
description: Get best-selling organic products sorted by units sold (highest first), then rating. Returns complete product details INCLUDING name, description, category, rating, review_count, price, units_sold, and stock_quantity. NOTE: This tool does NOT filter by price - if you need products in a specific price range, call this tool once with a higher limit and filter the results yourself based on the price field. All organic product tools access the same product catalog, just sorted differently.

category.description: Filter by category (smartphone, laptop, smartwatch, speaker, headphones). Omit for all categories.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return (default 10, range 1-50). Use higher limits (20-30) when you need to filter results by price or other criteria.

include_out_of_stock.description: Include out-of-stock products in results (default false)

name: get_most_popular
description: Get most popular organic products based on a calculated popularity score combining rating, reviews, and sales. Sorted by popularity score (highest first). Returns complete product details INCLUDING name, description, category, rating, review_count, price, units_sold, and stock_quantity. NOTE: This tool does NOT filter by price - if you need products in a specific price range, call this tool once with a higher limit and filter the results yourself based on the price field. All organic product tools access the same product catalog, just sorted differently. RECOMMENDED: Use this tool for balanced recommendations when you don't have a specific sorting preference.

category.description: Filter by category (smartphone, laptop, smartwatch, speaker, headphones). Omit for all categories.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return (default 10, range 1-50). Use higher limits (20-30) when you need to filter results by price or other criteria.

include_out_of_stock.description: Include out-of-stock products in results (default false)
